rows.wrapperRole: Cameroon wrapper sets top-note, color, and burn for this vitola.
rows.binderRole: Indonesian Jember binder supports structure and integration with the filler.
rows.fillerRole: Dominican Piloto Cubano filler drives body, strength, and the flavor arc Sterlon should echo.
rows.avoidIf: Beginner nicotine-sensitive, opposite wrapper style, or very short time window.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when the user cites this hall-of-fame stick, Dominican / Red Dot, or asks for a medium woodsy reference.
rows.catalogLine: Cohiba Dominican / Red Dot · 5 × 50 · Robusto · Medium · Dominican · $14 · Notes: cedar, wood, earth, leather
rows.memberBlurb: The recognizable U.S. Cohiba robusto - Cameroon wrapper, cream, cedar, and black pepper in a 5x50. Heritage name without island Cuban sourcing.
rows.sizeNote: Classic Red Dot robusto; HTD-10 is multi-vitola; CA24-20 is Riviera line.

rows.wrapperRole: Connecticut Corojo hybrid wrapper sets top-note, color, and burn for this vitola.
rows.binderRole: Brazil binder supports structure and integration with the filler.
rows.fillerRole: Nicaragua / Honduras filler drives body, strength, and the flavor arc Sterlon should echo.
rows.flavorNotes: earth, dark chocolate, espresso, apple pie, raisin
rows.bestFor: Bourbon or coffee pairing, experienced smoker wanting Liga complexity without broadleaf heaviness.
rows.avoidIf: User wants full body, maximum strength, or Liga Privada No. 9–class broadleaf power — H99 is the Connecticut-hybrid sub-line, not the maduro flagship.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when the user wants Drew Estate complexity with Connecticut sweetness — not No. 9 strength.
rows.catalogLine: Drew Estate Liga Privada H99 · 5 × 52 · Robusto · Medium · Nicaragua · $18 · Notes: earth, dark chocolate, espresso, apple pie, raisin
rows.sizeNote: H99 robusto; L5-DREW-LIGA9 is No. 9; CA25-11 is T52.
